positive: Stylized, graphic illustration of a celestial journey: a whimsical hot air balloon floating through a night sky filled with glowing nebulae, crescent moons, and constellations. The balloon is anchored by glowing ribbons that trail down to a landscape of sleeping mountains and a calm river. Use bold, clean silhouettes and high contrast. Color palette should emphasize deep indigos, vibrant magentas, electric teals, and warm gold accents. Minimalist yet magical feel, perfect for screen printing on apparel. Vector art aesthetic, symmetrical composition, centered main subjects, flat design elements with atmospheric depth, ultra-detailed.
negative: blurry, text, watermark, signature, logo, bad anatomy, artifact, noise, low detail, photorealistic, messy, grunge, cluttered, muted colors, negative space overload
